name: dosedesk
description: A verifiable medication dosage calculator and tutor. A strict verification mode routes every real calculation through a deterministic exact-arithmetic engine that reads inputs back, shows unit cancellation, refuses to infer missing order details, flags error-prone notation and high-alert drugs, and emits a defensible audit record. A separate tutor mode teaches and generates practice. Public-domain drug data only (openFDA/DailyMed/RxNorm). Zero Trust: standard library only, no external dependencies, no data egress.
